title: Sprint-Convention-Demo

recovery_note.reason: The original checkout hung on git status, git diff, git log, and direct source-file reads. Work moved to a fresh clone to preserve commit and validation hygiene.

deliverables: BSPC Power Cats palette replaces legacy Arcade Prime Time purple accents in coach app and parent portal tokens.
Roster tab renders a group-first sticky SectionList while preserving search, filters, active/inactive toggle, export, and aggregation stats.
One shared SwimmerPicker supports single/multi selection, group-first sections, inactive filtering, and optional COPPA/SafeSport consent filtering.
Audio and video sessions require pre-flight selected swimmer IDs, persist selectedSwimmerIds on session docs, and scope AI prompt/draft creation to those IDs without changing draft schemas.
Demo seed script creates deterministic demo-only data and refuses non-demo environments.
Demo runbook, Kevin TODO, MASTER_PLAN/README/stat handoff refresh, and sprint closeout docs are updated.
Branch is pushed and a single draft-ready PR is opened against main.
acceptance_criteria: npm run quality:dead-code exits 0 with empty output.
rg 'B388FF|#B388|#b388' src app parent-portal/src --files-with-matches returns no source-file matches.
src/config/theme.ts documents the sampled Power Cats colors from www.bspowercats.com and keeps gold #FFD700 reserved for PR/time-standard contexts.
Roster SectionList orders groups by GROUPS and drops empty groups.
SwimmerPicker tests cover group ordering, single select, multi toggle, consent filtering, and inactive filtering.
createAudioSession and createVideoSession require selectedSwimmerIds at the type and runtime boundary.
Video create session still requires the mandatory roster-pass consent guard and rejects blocked swimmers.
Audio and video Cloud Function tests assert selected_swimmers prompt blocks and prove unselected swimmers do not get drafts.
Legacy audio/video sessions with undefined selectedSwimmerIds are tolerated without draft schema changes.
seed:demo and seed:demo:reset are idempotent and safety-gated by EXPO_PUBLIC_BSPC_ENV=demo.
Docs and handoff stats are re-derived from current commands, not copied blindly from README.
out_of_scope: Do not restore the in-app add-meet flow or any meet-write helper deleted in commit 226cdae.
Do not restore the AI practice generator, Live Meet Ops, Recent PRs feed, medical-info screen, or practice-plan deep-link viewer.
Do not touch the Supabase parent-app cycle BSPC-2026-05-04-001, add @supabase/supabase-js, or create functions/src/triggers/onSwimmerWritten.ts.
Do not enroll Apple Developer, run EAS cloud builds, deploy Firebase, push to main, merge PRs, tag releases, or trigger paid/cloud actions.
Do not install on a physical device.
Do not bump major dependency versions.
Do not destructively change Firestore document shapes.
Do not introduce new top-level dependencies unless a later stop-and-review justifies it.
stop_conditions: Theme tokens conflict with hard-coded inline colors in more than 30 files.
www.bspowercats.com and the lessons page are unreachable and the provided screenshot/color guidance is ambiguous.
Pre-flight SwimmerPicker integration breaks more than two Maestro flows in a way that requires navigation changes beyond the picker step.
Cloud Function prompt scoping requires any draft schema change.
Demo seed data conflicts with Firestore indexes or rules.
The mandatory roster-pass consent guard in video.createVideoSession, aiDrafts.approveDraft, aiDrafts.approveAllDrafts, or videoDrafts.approveVideoDraft cannot be preserved.
Any test count drops by more than 5 percent net.
Any single phase exceeds 1.75x its target time.
An explicit non-goal becomes required for the demo to work.
phase_plan: Phase 4: shared SwimmerPicker plus audio/video pre-flight and AI scoping.
Phase 5: deterministic demo seed and runbook.
Phase 6: Maestro updates, docs refresh, and app stats.
Phase 7: Kevin closeout, final validation, push, and PR.
